title: Open the app and navigate to the 'FANS' section
preconditions: The app is installed and open
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the hamburger menu icon in the header | Navigate to the 'FANS' section

title: Click on the Ticketmaster Ad
expected_result: The user is redirected to the Ticketmaster website

title: Click on the 'AT THE GAME' section
preconditions: The 'AT THE GAME' section is visible
test_steps: Click on the 'AT THE GAME' section
expected_result: The 'AT THE GAME' section content is displayed

title: Click on the Broncos mascot image in the 'AT THE GAME' section
preconditions: The Broncos mascot image is visible in the 'AT THE GAME' section
test_steps: Click on the Broncos mascot image in the 'AT THE GAME' section
expected_result: The user is redirected to a page with more information about the Broncos mascot

title: Click on the 'PROMOTIONS' section and verify the content
test_steps: Click on the 'PROMOTIONS' section | Verify the content of the 'PROMOTIONS' section
expected_result: The content of the 'PROMOTIONS' section is displayed correctly

title: Click on the 'CONTESTS' section and verify the content
test_steps: Click on the 'CONTESTS' section | Verify the content of the 'CONTESTS' section
expected_result: The content of the 'CONTESTS' section is displayed correctly

title: Click on the 'AT THE GAME' section and verify the content
preconditions: The 'AT THE GAME' section is visible
test_steps: Click on the 'AT THE GAME' section | Verify the content of the 'AT THE GAME' section
expected_result: The content of the 'AT THE GAME' section is displayed correctly
